prompt_summary: 根据雨夜医院门口重逢分镜，生成2条AI绘图Prompt，涵盖林晚独站雨中和顾沉下车对视两个镜头，保持冷色雨夜光影和电影感写实风格一致。

items.source_visual_description: 林晚撑着黑伞站在医院门口台阶边，雨水打湿地面。
items.positive_prompt: cinematic realistic vertical frame, rainy night at hospital entrance, young woman standing on wet stone steps holding a black umbrella, heavy rain falling, ground reflecting ambient light, solitary figure, medium shot, eye-level angle, cold blue-gray atmosphere, detailed wet pavement, realistic rain droplets, dramatic mood
items.negative_prompt: low quality, blurry, bad anatomy, extra fingers, distorted face, watermark, text, logo, overexposed, duplicate people, cartoon style
items.camera_language: 中景，平视机位，林晚位于台阶中段，雨幕作为前景层次。
items.lighting: 冷色环境光，雨夜散射光，湿地微反射，整体低照度压抑氛围。
items.color_palette: 蓝灰色主调，深黑伞面，暗部偏青，少量环境暖光反衬。
items.character_consistency: 林晚，年轻女性，持黑伞，身形单薄，服装深色，保持与下一场景的连续性。
items.environment: 雨夜医院门口，石阶，玻璃门廊，湿滑地面，都市夜景背景虚化。
items.composition: 竖幅构图，人物偏左或居中，台阶引导视线向下，雨丝增加画面纵深感。
items.model_hint: general image model, prioritize realistic cinematic rain effects and clean human anatomy
items.notes: 保持雨夜医院门口场景一致性，为下镜头顾沉出现预留空间。

items.source_visual_description: 顾沉从黑色轿车里下来，两人在车灯和雨幕中对视。
items.positive_prompt: cinematic realistic vertical frame, rainy night hospital entrance, young man stepping out of black sedan, car door open, bright cold headlights cutting through heavy rain, young woman with black umbrella standing on steps, two people staring at each other across the rain, tense confrontation mood, medium shot, eye-level angle, dramatic backlighting from car, wet road reflections
items.negative_prompt: low quality, blurry, bad anatomy, extra fingers, distorted face, watermark, text, logo, overexposed, duplicate people, cartoon style, malformed hands
items.camera_language: 中景，平视机位，两人分居画面两侧，车灯形成逆光轮廓，雨幕分隔视线。
items.lighting: 冷色车灯强光与雨夜环境光对冲，逆光勾勒人物轮廓，面部受环境光反射。
items.color_palette: 冷白车灯，蓝灰雨夜，黑伞与深色车身的重色块，地面反光偏冷青。
items.character_consistency: 顾沉年轻男性，深色外套，刚从车内出来；林晚延续黑伞造型，两人保持与上一场服装一致。
items.environment: 雨夜医院门口，黑色轿车停靠路边，石阶，雨幕密集，都市夜雨街道。
items.composition: 竖幅构图，车与人物形成对角线，车灯位于画面一侧制造光晕，人物视线交汇点在中景。
items.model_hint: general image model, prioritize realistic cinematic lighting and proper human proportions in rainy conditions
items.notes: 确保顾沉与林晚的相对位置符合分镜描述，保持冷色车灯与雨夜氛围的连续性。
